stemHtml: An operator with an aircraft with an MOPSC of 19 notices the first aid kit is missing. Which of the following applies?

options.a: The operator must replace the first aid kit before any further flights can be carried out.
options.b: The aircraft is allowed to operate one flight before the first-aid kit has to be added.
options.c: The flight can go ahead as long as there are no babies and elderly passengers onboard.
options.d: The flight can go ahead since a first aid kit is not required for this aircraft.
